Supermarket Simulator Guide

Version Compare & Similar Games

Platform differences, version history, and games like Supermarket Simulator.

Platform Availability

PlatformStatusNotes
Steam (PC)AvailableFull release June 2025. Full controller support, Steam Cloud, achievements.
Xbox Cloud GamingAvailableVia Game Pass cloud streaming. Same build as PC.
Google Play / App StoreDifferent GameMobile "Supermarket Simulator" games are unrelated clones by different developers.
RobloxDifferent GameRoblox "Supermarket Simulator" experiences are fan-made and unrelated to Nokta Games.
Nintendo Switch / PS5Not announcedNo console ports confirmed as of May 2026.

Version History

v1.0 — Full Release

June 19, 2025

Official 1.0 release out of Early Access. Added full controller support, Steam Achievements, and polished co-op stability.

Early Access Launch

February 20, 2024

Initial Steam Early Access release. Core loop: stocking, pricing, checkout, and basic expansion.

For the latest patch notes, visit the Steam News Hub.

Similar Games to Try

Gas Station Simulator

Drago Entertainment • Steam

Similar management loop but with vehicle fuel mechanics and desert setting.

Potion Craft

niceplay games • Steam, Xbox, PS

Alchemy shop management with crafting depth and charming art style.

Cozy Grove

Spry Fox • Steam, Switch, Mobile

Relaxing island life sim with daily tasks and decorating. Less business-focused.

Diner Simulator

Drago Entertainment • Steam

Restaurant management with cooking mechanics. Same publisher as Gas Station Simulator.

Internet Cafe Simulator 2

Cheetah Games • Steam

Manage a PC gaming cafe. Similar first-person management but with tech upgrades.

Cafe Owner Simulator

Second Reality • Steam

Run a coffee shop. Comparable shelf-stocking and customer service mechanics.
